title: RAK2287 packet forwarder and 6LBR integration
description: Integrate RAK2287 with Rust mesh-gateway for UDP/CoAP forwarding, RPL DODAG root, SCHC adaptation. Support LoRaWAN-to-IPv6 mapping if applicable. Update border router logic per spec section 17.
close_reason: Updated Gateway to use RplNode::new_root for 6LBR RPL root support; first step toward full packet forwarder and border router integration per spec
